channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Insomnia Cookies: Free Pint of Ice Cream with Any Pack Purchase Today
item.guid: Insomnia Cookies-Free Pint of Ice Cream with Any Pack Pur-2026-07-24
item.description: Today only (July 24), Insomnia Cookies is offering a free pint of ice cream with any cookie pack purchase, valid online or in the app. (July 24, 2026)

item.title: Jimmy John's: Free House-Made Lemonade with Any 8-Inch Sandwich or Wrap Today
item.guid: Jimmy John's-Free House-Made Lemonade with Any 8-Inch-2026-07-24
item.description: Use promo code SUMMERFRIDAY at checkout online or in-app to get a free House-Made Lemonade with the purchase of any 8-inch sandwich, toasted sandwich, or wrap; also valid July 24. (July 24, 2026)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Wingstop has revived its fan-favorite $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal for soccer season, offering a large order of boneless wings at a bundled price. (Limited time)

item.title: Krispy Kreme: $5 Dozen Original Glazed Blueberry Doughnuts with Any Dozen Purchase
item.guid: Krispy Kreme-$5 Dozen Original Glazed Blueberry Dough-2026-07-24
item.description: From July 23-26, add a dozen Original Glazed Blueberry Flavored Doughnuts to your order for just $5 when you buy any regular-priced dozen or 16ct Minis; use promo code BLUEBERRY online or in-app for pickup or delivery. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Domino's: Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings for $-2026-07-24
item.description: Order any pizza with your choice of crust and toppings for just $9.99, with Parmesan Stuffed Crust now included at no extra charge; available online or via the app. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu: Chicken, Tenders, or Sandwich
item.guid: Popeyes-$5 Faves Menu: Chicken, Tenders, or Sand-2026-07-24
item.description: Order any of three $5 items including 3-piece Signature Chicken, 3 Tenders, or a Chicken Sandwich in-store, online, or in the app; request the $5 Faves offer when ordering in-store. (Through August 30, 2026)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Get a $5 Your Way Meal with a sandwich, small fries, and a small drink available every day through the Burger King app at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Denny's: Slammin' Meal Deals Starting at $5.99
item.description: Denny's is offering Slammin' Meal Deals starting at $5.99 at participating locations, available all day including late-night hours. (Ongoing)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders
item.description: Get any Arby's Slider for $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time; no app or code required. (Limited time)

item.title: KFC: 24-Piece Nugget Bucket for $10
item.description: Pick up a 24-piece Nugget Bucket for $10 or a 12-piece Chicken Bucket for $15 at participating KFC locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Subway: $5.99 Footlong with Code FL599 in App
item.guid: Subway-$5.99 Footlong with Code FL599 in App-2026-07-24
item.description: Order a Footlong sub for $5.99 when you enter code FL599 at checkout in the Subway app; availability varies by zip code. (Limited time)
